$note: One row per factual claim. status drives the evidence badge. publicSafe=false means the claim must be hidden in public-safe mode (gated/account-source or private-only). Every claim carries source ids and a date checked. No scores, ratings, or advice.

statusLegend.public-primary: Public primary — issuer filing, regulator, official explorer, or official docs.
statusLegend.public-secondary: Public secondary — public aggregator, press, or research; useful context, not primary proof.
statusLegend.official-gated: Official gated / account-source — authentic but account-gated; public redistribution permission not established.
statusLegend.internal-lead: Internal lead — working note pending a primary source.

claims.label: Legal structure
claims.value: Private fund relying on the SEC 3(c)(7) exemption

claims.label: Issuer / CIK
claims.value: BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund Ltd. · CIK 0002013810

claims.label: Minimum investment (Form D)
claims.value: $100,000 minimum accepted per Form D filing

claims.label: AUM (public cross-check)
claims.value: ~$2.235B total asset value (RWA.xyz), as of 2026-06-29

claims.label: Holders (public cross-check)
claims.value: 110 holders; ~$650.7M 30-day transfer volume (RWA.xyz), as of 2026-06-29

claims.label: Smart-contract framework audit
claims.value: Halborn assessment of Securitize DSToken / DS Protocol v4: 0 critical, 0 high, 2 medium (solved); 100% remediated 2025-10-29. Covers the framework, not BUIDL's live key custody.

claims.label: On-chain AUM (public, all 9 deployments)
claims.value: Total on-chain supply across all nine BUIDL contracts = $2,248,596,182.75 at the fund's $1.00 NAV (tokens are 6 decimals), read directly from each contract's totalSupply on 2026-07-01. Per chain: Ethereum BUIDL-I $831.01M · Solana $636.35M · Avalanche $402.37M · Ethereum Class A $186.82M · BNB $110.55M · Optimism $26.26M · Arbitrum $25.21M · Aptos $16.10M · Polygon $13.93M. A public, independently reproducible AUM figure (no account access required).

claims.label: All 9 contracts confirmed on-chain
claims.value: Every BUIDL contract was confirmed by direct on-chain read on 2026-07-01 — each returns name 'BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund', symbol BUIDL (BUIDL-I for the institutional class), 6 decimals: ETH Class A 0x7712c342…aa2aec, ETH BUIDL-I 0x6a9DA2D7…C89041, Arbitrum 0xa6525ae4…925872, Optimism 0xa1cdab15…957cf5, BNB 0x2d5bdc96…5ef84f, Avalanche 0x53fc82f1…196a2f, Polygon 0x2893ef55…dc0e99, Solana GyWgeqpy5…w6phr, Aptos 0x50038be5…45f89. This upgrades the six previously aggregator-sourced addresses to on-chain-verified.

claims.label: SEC filings (complete history)
claims.value: SEC EDGAR lists exactly two filings for CIK 0002013810: the original Form D (accession 0002014390-24-000001, filed 2024-03-18) and the amended Form D/A (accession 0002004687-25-000001, filed 2025-07-18). The D/A is the latest SEC filing — consistent with a private fund relying on the 3(c)(7) exemption.

claims.label: Authoritative ownership record
claims.value: Unverified - additional primary source required. BUIDL does not publicly disclose which record (transfer-agent register vs on-chain token) legally controls ownership.

claims.label: Redemption minimum, fees, gates, suspension
claims.value: Unverified - additional primary source required. Requires Private Offering Memorandum / redemption documents.

claims.label: Control surface (public code)
claims.value: DS Protocol v4 roles — Master, Issuer (mint/burn/SEIZE), Transfer Agent (freeze/unfreeze), Exchange (KYC registration). Transfers are permissioned; only allowlisted wallets can custody or receive tokens.

claims.label: Role-holder addresses (Issuer / Transfer Agent)
claims.value: Unverified - additional primary source required. The DS Protocol Issuer (mint/burn/seize) and Transfer-Agent (freeze) roles resolve through a registry/TrustService, not owner(), and are not yet confirmed on-chain here.

claims.label: Ethereum Class A contract owner (on-chain)
claims.value: owner() on the Ethereum Class A proxy 0x7712c342…aa2aec returns 0xe01605f6b6dc593b7d2917f4a0940db2a625b09e, which has no contract code (an externally-owned account, not an on-chain multisig) as of 2026-07-01. Under the DS Protocol proxy this owner can setOwner/setTarget (upgrade). Whether the EOA is backed by an off-chain MPC/custody arrangement is Unverified - additional primary source required.

claims.label: Arbitrum proxy implementation + pattern (on-chain)
claims.value: The Arbitrum proxy 0xa6525ae4…925872 ERC1967 implementation slot reads 0xdbf6db49066784a69244d3b33cf44c25ec86c0f7 (matches the documented implementation); the ERC1967 admin slot is empty, consistent with a UUPS-style proxy where upgrade authorization lives in the implementation rather than a proxy admin. Read on-chain 2026-07-01.

claims.label: owner() concentration across all EVM chains (on-chain)
claims.value: owner() returns the same address — 0xe01605f6b6dc593b7d2917f4a0940db2a625b09e — on all seven EVM BUIDL contracts (Class A, BUIDL-I, Arbitrum, Optimism, BNB, Avalanche, Polygon), read 2026-07-01. That address is an externally-owned account (no contract code, i.e. not an on-chain multisig). Under DS Protocol this owner controls the proxy (upgrade). Material control-concentration observation. Whether the EOA is backed by an off-chain MPC/custody arrangement is Unverified - additional primary source required.

claims.label: Legal structure
claims.value: Registered '40-Act constant-NAV (CNAV) money market mutual fund

claims.label: Identity / rename
claims.value: WisdomTree Treasury Money Market Digital Fund (renamed from 'Government' eff. 2025-11-01 per GENIUS Act) · CIK 0001859001

claims.label: Objective & holdings policy
claims.value: High current income with capital preservation and liquidity at a stable $1.00 NAV; holds U.S. Treasury and government money-market instruments. Detailed holdings not publicly disclosed.

claims.label: Fees
claims.value: 0.25% (25 bps) management fee; 12b-1 fee $0; gas/transaction fees borne by WisdomTree Digital Management (investors pay nothing)

claims.label: Eligibility
claims.value: U.S. persons only, 18+, retail (no accreditation), KYC/AML; stablecoin issuers eligible since 2025-11-01; $1.00 minimum; access via WisdomTree Prime app / Connect web only

claims.label: On-chain token value (public cross-check)
claims.value: $764.3M (−16.03% over 30 days) per RWA.xyz, as of 2026-06-30 — this tracks the tokenized on-chain representation, not total fund net assets (see the SEC N-MFP claim and the reconciliation note).

claims.label: Official net assets, yield & monthly holdings (SEC N-MFP)
claims.value: SEC N-MFP filings report month-end fund net assets: $910,309,488.09 as of 2026-05-31, up from $660.7M at 2025-11-30 (7 consecutive monthly filings). 7-day net yield 3.38% (2026-05-29). The filing also discloses the full portfolio monthly (10 line items at 05-31, incl. U.S. Treasury bills and government funds) — so holdings ARE publicly disclosed with a monthly cadence.

claims.label: Reconciliation: SEC net assets vs on-chain value
claims.value: SEC-filed fund net assets GREW to $910.3M (2026-05-31) while the RWA.xyz on-chain token value fell to $764.3M (−16% / 30d, 2026-06-30). These measure different things (total fund net assets vs the tokenized on-chain representation) and the dates differ; the divergence itself is a finding — cause Unverified - additional primary source required.

claims.label: Authoritative ownership record
claims.value: Transfer-agent book-entry (WisdomTree Transfers, Inc.) is the authoritative record. The on-chain token is supplementary and reconciled to the book-entry at least daily; the transfer-agent record prevails on conflict.

claims.label: Redemption & settlement
claims.value: Daily; underlying assets settle T+1. Exact same-day cut-off time and gate/suspension language: Unverified - additional primary source required.

claims.label: Service providers
claims.value: Custodian BNY Mellon; transfer agent WisdomTree Transfers, Inc.; sub-adviser Voya Investment Management; auditor Ernst & Young; blockchain infra WisdomTree Digital Management (proprietary)

claims.label: Legal structure
claims.value: Registered '40-Act U.S. government money fund (FOBXX). NOTE: retail BENJI/FOBXX and institutional iBENJI (BVI) are distinct products — do not conflate.

claims.label: Objective & holdings policy
claims.value: At least 99.5% of total assets in U.S. government securities, cash, and repurchase agreements. Detailed holdings not publicly disclosed.

claims.label: Historic milestone
claims.value: First U.S.-registered mutual fund to use a public blockchain to process transactions and record share ownership (inception 2021-04-06; primary chain Stellar).

claims.label: AUM (public cross-check)
claims.value: Retail FOBXX ~$808M; institutional iBENJI ~$1.60B; combined ~$2.4B; ~1,117 retail wallet addresses, as of 2026-06-30 (RWA.xyz)

claims.label: Official net assets, yield & monthly holdings (SEC N-MFP)
claims.value: SEC N-MFP filings report FOBXX month-end net assets: $813,503,614.42 as of 2026-05-31, with 19 monthly filings back to 2024-11 ($432.9M) — an official, public growth series. 7-day net yield 3.46% (2026-05-29). The filing discloses the full portfolio monthly (75 line items at 05-31: Treasury repo counterparties incl. Bank of America, plus government agency paper) — holdings ARE publicly disclosed with a monthly cadence. Fund category: U.S. Treasury Repurchase Agreement (Treasuries-and-cash collateral only).

claims.label: Fees
claims.value: Management fee ~0.20% (20 bps) — secondary; verify against current 497. No redemption fees (prospectus). 12b-1 and total expense ratio: Unverified - additional primary source required.

claims.label: Authoritative ownership record
claims.value: Transfer agent (Benji platform, Franklin Templeton) maintains the official record; all fund and shareholder records under the transfer agent's full control. A secondary source frames the blockchain as 'part of the official system of record' (hybrid). Transfer agent prevails on conflict.

claims.label: Redemption & settlement
claims.value: Daily redemption; no redemption fee; no minimum redemption; on-chain transfer continuous (24/7); underlying settlement T+1 (secondary).

claims.label: Service providers
claims.value: Transfer agent: Benji platform (Franklin Templeton proprietary). Custodian: J.P. Morgan (secondary). Financial auditor: PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP — signs the audit opinion in the N-CSR annual report filed 2026-05-28 (public-primary). Sub-adviser: Unverified - additional primary source required.

claims.label: Legal structure
claims.value: Short-term variable-NAV (VNAV) money market fund; UCITS sub-fund of Spiko SICAV; regulated by AMF (France). Price accretes as yield compounds — not a fixed $1.00 CNAV.

claims.label: Objective & holdings policy
claims.value: 100% of assets in T-bills issued by investment-grade Eurozone member states, repo secured by such securities, and cash; weighted average maturity under 60 days. Detailed holdings not publicly disclosed.

claims.label: Fees
claims.value: 0.30% management fee + up to 0.05% operating expenses (~0.35% max annual) — secondary. Performance / subscription / redemption fees: none confirmed.

claims.label: Eligibility
claims.value: Non-U.S. investors only (U.S. persons excluded); retail + institutional (UCITS); €1,000 minimum; KYC/AML with allowlisted wallets; self-custody allowed.

claims.label: Yield (public)
claims.value: 7-day APY 2.14%; 30-day APY 1.99% (RWA.xyz), as of 2026-06-30

claims.label: Authoritative ownership record
claims.value: The public blockchain IS the primary share registry (bypasses the traditional CSD). Each token is the legal unit of the fund. Transfers KYC/AML-gated to allowlisted wallets via Permission Manager.

claims.label: Redemption & settlement
claims.value: T+0 (same-day) for orders before 11:30 Paris time; next-business-day for later orders; daily liquidity; 24/7 on-chain transfer between allowlisted wallets. Minimum redemption / fees: none confirmed.

claims.label: Service providers
claims.value: Custodian/depositary & administrator: CACEIS (Crédit Agricole). Fund manager: Twenty First Capital (secondary). Transfer agent & broker: Spiko. Auditor: PwC (4 audits/year). Smart-contract auditor: Trail of Bits (Oct 2023).

claims.label: Control surface (public code)
claims.value: OpenZeppelin UUPS upgradeable proxy; Permission Manager (7 groups); super-admin multisig (upgrades + permissions); exceptional-operator can pause; daily-operator mints/redeems; oracle-operator publishes NAV; Chainlink CCIP bridge.

claims.label: Smart-contract audit
claims.value: Trail of Bits audit (October 2023); report publicly available.

claims.label: Contracts confirmed on-chain
claims.value: Confirmed by direct on-chain read on 2026-07-01 — each returns name 'Spiko EU T-Bills Money Market Fund', symbol EUTBL, 5 decimals: Ethereum / Polygon / Base 0xa0769f7a8fc65e47de93797b4e21c073c117fc80 and Arbitrum 0xcbeb19549054cc0a6257a77736fc78c367216ce7. On-chain unit supply (VNAV, so value = units × NAV, not 1:1): Arbitrum 280.73M · Base 17.28M · Polygon 47.58M · Ethereum 14.51M units. Upgrades these addresses from aggregator-sourced to on-chain-verified.
